text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Mmm～! This breeze feels great! Yeah……Good thing I came outside today.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh～ So there's a small park in a place 
like that? ……Might check it out.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there it is there it is! ……I see, 
it's quiet and you can see the stars 
quite clearly.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……9 more locations, guess I'll check 
them out now.

Stay Gold stayed out late and did not 
seem to get much sleep that night.
